title: Product specification and architecture for CMMC Shield MVP
description: Create the MVP product spec based on mission summary and research output. Define: (1) data model for control families and assessment responses, (2) SSP document template structure, (3) POA&M schema, (4) C3PAO readiness scoring algorithm, (5) tech stack recommendation (web framework, DB, auth, Stripe), (6) user flow wireframes for gap assessment → SSP → POA&M → dashboard. Target: 3-tier SaaS ($99/$199/$299/mo). Output: products/product-0603/specs/mvp_spec.md
